name: IdsEdwClmLnCchgRplcDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH base AS (SELECT CLC.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK AS CLM_LN_CCHG_SK, CLC.CLM_ID, CLC.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, CLC.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLC.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CLC.CLM_SK, CLC.CLM_LN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLC.VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC AS CLC LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD1 ON CLC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD2 ON CLC.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CLC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND CLC.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK NOT IN (0,1)), union_na AS (SELECT 1 AS CLM_LN_CCHG_SK, 'NA' AS CLM_ID, 1 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'NA' AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, '175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, 1 AS CLM_SK, 1 AS CLM_LN_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'NA' AS VRSN_ID), union_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS CLM_LN_CCHG_SK, 'UNK' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'UNK' AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, '175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, 0 AS CLM_SK, 0 AS CLM_LN_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS VRSN_ID) SELECT * FROM base UNION ALL SELECT * FROM union_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM union_unk
